name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: 1690 N Pearl St in Denver, CO hosts Western Union Money Order Only, a standalone check-cashing location open 24/7.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only operates at 1690 N Pearl St in downtown Denver, CO as a standalone check-cashing store. This Denver location is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, making it accessible for after-hours financial transactions.

The Denver branch provides money order services at competitive rates with professional staff. If you need assistance with a money order in Denver, CO, you can reach them directly at +1 303-832-1711 to confirm current rates or ask about available services.

For Denver residents needing quick money orders at any hour, this Pearl St location offers reliable service without typical bank wait times. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your payment method when you visit, and you'll be ready for a fast transaction.
pros: Extensive network of 150+ locations in Denver area with multiple agent partners (King Soopers, Walgreens, 7-Eleven, Safeway, Circle K)
24/7 online transaction initiation available through WU.com with flexible in-store completion
Money order services available at multiple dedicated locations including several 7-Eleven and Circle K stores
Multi-language support in six languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Extended hours at many locations (7-Eleven locations open until 11:59 PM daily)
Multiple service options beyond money orders including bill payment, mobile top-up, and inmate payments
Western Union Rewards loyalty program for frequent users
cons: Transaction fees apply to each money order and transfer, making repeated use costly
Service limitations vary by location—many locations offer money orders only, not full money transfer services
$300 maximum payout limit enforced at certain agent locations (Walgreens #356)
Reliance on third-party retail partners means inconsistent hours and potential service gaps
No account-based relationship or fraud protection typical of traditional banking services
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing to send money without a bank account
People requiring quick cash pickup from transfers at convenient retail locations
Consumers in neighborhoods where Western Union agent locations are more accessible than banks
Customers who need to send international or domestic money transfers with flexible payment options
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers who need convenient access to money orders and money transfer services through neighborhood retail locations, without requiring traditional bank accounts. The main caveat is that the service is transaction-based with per-use fees, location-specific limitations on available services, and variable hours depending on the retail partner location.
services: Receive money on a card option
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 1690 N Pearl St, Denver, CO. Open 24/7 for check cashing and money orders.
